# Optimal, LLC

> Optimal is the secure access layer for government-ready AI — authorizing every
> model call, blocking what shouldn't cross the accreditation boundary, and
> proving every control across GovCloud, on-prem, and air-gapped environments.

## About

- **Legal name:** Optimal, LLC
- **Website:** https://gooptimal.io
- **Contact:** ryan@gooptimal.io

## Certifications & set-aside eligibility

- **Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB)** — SBA-certified.
- **Veteran-Owned Small Business (VOSB)** — SBA-certified.
- Certified through the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) Veteran Small
  Business Certification (VetCert) program; publicly listed on the SBA
  certification registry at https://search.certifications.sba.gov/.
- Eligible to compete for **SDVOSB and VOSB set-aside contracts**.

## Platform

- Secure AI Gateway — one governed boundary for every model call.
- Agent Governance — per-agent identity, tool/data-scope allowlists, kill switch.
- Red-team & Assurance — OWASP LLM Top 10 probes gating model promotion.
- Compliance Evidence — hash-chained, append-only audit of every request and token.

## Standards

FedRAMP 20x, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, SOC 2, OWASP LLM Top 10, IL4–IL6, HIPAA,
PCI DSS v4, DISA STIG.

## Key pages

- Home: https://gooptimal.io/
- Contact / request access: https://gooptimal.io/contact
- Blog: https://gooptimal.io/blog
- Industries — Healthcare: https://gooptimal.io/industries/healthcare
- Industries — Financial services: https://gooptimal.io/industries/financial-services
- Industries — State & local government: https://gooptimal.io/industries/sled
